batch_objective: Flow Builder CRC block (FB batch-52). A template-driven CRC block in the pipeline (... -> PATCH -> CRC -> WRITE-OUT/CHECK): compute the CRC over the post-patch image via a JSON template config, inject it (growing (mem_map,ranges) when the output window lies outside loaded ranges), thread the extended image forward. Ordering PATCH->CRC (CRC-before-PATCH = WARN, non-blocking). Reuse the batch-57/58 kernel (parse_crc_config + check_regions + inject_crcs); NO crc.py refactor. + the AMD-1 before/after twin ribbon that grows on CRC.
